specific_location: Prewitt Reservoir, outlet canal near west end of dam, in grove of black locust trees approximately 40.43 deg N, 103.37 deg W
description: vireo-type bill; no wing bars; white crescents below eyes; black eye line with white above and some contrast with crown above that, although contrast not as sharp as shown in Sibley (2000/2011); flight feathers darker than wing coverts; dark lore; yellow throat, white belly, yellow undertail covertsBehaviors: The bird was moving around, presumably feeding, in a grove of black locust trees.Call: not singing; also don't recall hearing callPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: David Dowell, David Dowell, David Dowell, David Dowell
